device.name: Laptop AC Adapter / Power Supply (230 W)

in_use_w.note: output up to 230 W; input ~250 W at full load (~90% efficient). Typical laptop use far less; full draw only under heavy CPU/GPU load

energy_per_charge_wh.note: to charge a large laptop battery once

estimated_annual_kwh.note: usage-dependent; high end assumes a heavily-used workstation laptop

notes: This is a high-wattage (230 W) charger for a workstation/gaming-class Lenovo laptop. Actual draw tracks laptop workload, not the 230 W rating. No-load standby is negligible; unplugging when fully charged saves very little.
